classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图右上黄色框内，显示电机端面安装结构、孔位角度和尺寸引线，包含可见尺寸文字'CW'、'90°'、'45°'、'⌀32±0.1'、'4-M3▽ 5.5'，属于端面安装孔距、旋转方向和机械尺寸标注，不是曲线或针脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected diameter symbol from OCR text
Removed 'T' character, which is OCR noise

translation_notes: Angular dimensions indicate mounting hole distribution pattern

dimension_records.reason: CW indicates clockwise rotation direction for the motor shaft
90° indicates the angular spacing between mounting holes on the bolt circle
45° indicates the angular offset of the first mounting hole from the reference axis
Diameter of the bolt circle on which the mounting holes are positioned
Four M3 threaded mounting holes
Depth of the M3 threaded mounting holes, indicated by the counterbore/depth symbol

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Four M3 threaded mounting holes on a Φ32±0.1 mm bolt circle, with 90° angular spacing and 45° offset from reference axis. Threaded hole depth is 5.5 mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Front mounting flange with circular pattern
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Motor rotation direction is clockwise (CW) when viewed from the front
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Flange outer diameter, center bore diameter, and overall flange thickness are not specified in this cropped view. OCR items ocr_004 (木), ocr_005 (D), ocr_006 (O), ocr_007 (A), ocr_009 (±0.1), ocr_012 (4-M3√5.5), and ocr_013 (3.5) were identified as OCR noise, duplicates, or fragments and excluded from final annotations.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence OCR fragments near center area, possibly misread symbols or noise from centerlines and construction geometry. No clear engineering meaning.
Single letter 'D' with rotated angle, likely OCR error from diameter symbol or construction line, already captured in ocr_008 as part of Φ32±0.1
Duplicate tolerance reading, already included in ocr_008 (32±0.1)
Combined OCR string with incorrect symbol (√ instead of depth symbol), broken into separate annotations ocr_010 and ocr_011
Unclear dimension location and meaning; spatially close to 5.5 depth callout but no visible separate annotation in image. Possibly OCR misread or duplicate.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域和完整标注源图中的对应蓝框均显示电机端面结构、安装孔分布、角度标注'90°'和'45°'、孔规格'4-M3▽ 5.5'、孔距或直径尺寸'32±0.1'以及引线长度'300±15'等机械尺寸信息，没有针脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'电气原理图'，显示电机符号'M'以及左右两端接点，并标注电源极性'+'和'-'，表达电机供电端子的正负极连接关系；在给定类别中最接近动力电源接口/接线定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR detected '1' with low confidence (0.48), but visual inspection shows this is a minus symbol '-' for polarity marking
OCR detected 'O' but visual context shows this is a plus symbol '+' for positive polarity terminal

terminology_notes: M symbol represents motor in electrical schematics
+ and - symbols indicate DC polarity terminals
translation_notes: This is an electrical schematic, not a mechanical dimension drawing
Symbols are standard electrical notation, not dimensional callouts

dimension_records.reason: Left terminal connection polarity marking in electrical schematic
Right terminal connection polarity marking in electrical schematic
Standard motor symbol notation in electrical schematic diagram

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: DC motor with positive (+) and negative (-) polarity terminals. Left terminal marked positive, right terminal marked negative.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No dimensional or mechanical specifications present in this electrical schematic region

quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
